name: fitness-studio-operations
description: Fitness-studio operations team — 3 agents (fitness-studio-operations-lead, member-retention-analyst, class-and-instructor-ops-lead) for running boutique studios, gyms, and personal-training studios as businesses: membership models (recurring, drop-in, class packs), the retention/churn economic engine (churn math, at-risk detection, win-back), class scheduling and capacity (utilization, waitlists), instructor/trainer pay (rev-share vs hourly vs per-head, the practical 1099-vs-W2 line), front-desk experience, retail revenue, and unit economics (LTV/CAC, revenue per member, no-show policy). The studio-ops craft — not coaching, bookkeeping, or campaigns. 5 skills, a decision-tree knowledge bank (pricing, retention, capacity, pay-model, no-show trees + a dated 2026 benchmark map), 7 best-practices, 3 templates, 3 commands, 1 hook. Seams: books/payroll -> accounting-bookkeeping; campaigns -> marketing-operations; hiring/classification -> people-operations-hr. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
